summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Emergent — Bahri Contract, Recap & Clause Management Platform (iteration 2). Backend: 30/30 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows working - login with Bahri branding, dashboard with 6 stats + shortcut cards, Clause Library with CRUD/versioning/tagging/compare, Q88 vessel lookup (mock), Alerts, Noticeboard, Audit Trail, Recap Detail with 8 tabs including Linked Clauses and Attachments.
critical_code_review_comments: All new endpoints working correctly: clauses CRUD, clause compare with GPT-5.2, attachments with object storage, audit trail, noticeboard, alerts, Q88 vessel lookup
Role-based access control working: chartering users cannot approve/delete clauses (403), only legal/admin can
Charter Party ID format correct: CP-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX
AI clause comparison via GPT-5.2 returns proper analysis with differences, overlaps, summary, and disclaimer
Q88 vessel lookup (MOCK) correctly returns vessel details for BAHRI ABHA, BAHRI TABUK, SEA LION, etc.
Seed endpoint now creates 5 recaps + 6 clauses + 1 notice
Stats endpoint includes clause counts (total and approved)
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/seed to create 5 demo recaps + 6 clauses + 1 notice
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_fip_api_v2.py cover: clauses CRUD with versioning, clause compare with AI, attachments upload/download/delete, audit trail, noticeboard, alerts, Q88 vessel lookup, charter party ID, linked clauses. Frontend tested via Playwright: login with Bahri branding, dashboard with stats strip (6 items) and shortcut cards, Clause Library with filters/search/compare mode, Clause Compare with GPT-5.2 AI analysis, Create Recap with Q88 lookup, Recap Detail with 8 tabs, role-based UI (chartering cannot see approve/delete buttons).

frontend.dashboard_stats_strip_6_items: PASS (Total, Draft, Under Review, Approved, Fixed, Clauses)
frontend.sidebar_navigation: PASS (Dashboard, New Recap, Clause Library, Alerts, Noticeboard, Audit Trail, AI Parser)
frontend.recap_detail_8_tabs: PASS (Overview, Raw Text, Versions, Linked Clauses, Attachments, Comments, Approvals, Audit)
